title: Nestle India International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nestle India International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Nestle India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nestle India International Enterprises:
Nestle India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
